purpose: Minimal backend contract and wiring for onboarding start/status around the local repo-managed onboarding runtime.

endpoints.name: onboarding_start
behavior: Create or reuse local onboarding runtime artifacts under generated/draft and generated/validated
Return structured JSON with normalized state

endpoints.name: onboarding_status
behavior: Read validation report and idempotency marker when available
Map artifact presence to normalized onboarding state

state_model.accepted: Start request accepted and local onboarding runtime artifacts were created
state_model.needs_repair: Validation failed and repair was routed
state_model.in_progress: Draft artifacts exist but no terminal state yet
state_model.not_found: No onboarding artifacts found for tenant
